channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The new Clicks Power Keyboard can turn your phone into a BlackBerry – and it doubles as a wireless charger too
item.description: The Clicks Powerkeyboard will wirelessly charge your phone and gives you a physical keyboard as well.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: A California lawmaker wants to ban AI from children’s toys
item.description: A California lawmaker has introduced a first-in-the-nation bill meant to ban companies from embedding AI chatbot technology into toys designed for children.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: AI may not be the federal buzzword for 2026
item.description: Federal News Network asked federal acquisition and IT experts what initiatives they are paying close attention to in the new year. The post AI may not be the federal buzzword for 2026 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: AI’s most important benchmark in 2026? Trust
item.description: In 2026 (and beyond) the best benchmark for large language models won’t be MMLU or AgentBench or GAIA. It will be trust—something AI will have to rebuild before it can be broadly useful and valuable to both consumers and businesses. Researchers identify several different kinds of AI trust.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: How to watch Hell's Kitchen online: stream Battle of the States, season 24 for FREE from anywhere
item.description: Want to watch Hell's Kitchen from anywhere? Stream every new twist as chefs face brutal challengers, fiery eliminations, and Ramsay's relentless pressure.
item.dc:creator: Krishi Chowdhary, TechRadar

item.title: On a remote Alaskan glacier, a 73-year mission of recovery and respect
item.description: "The glacier is changing rapidly. We don't know how much time we have leftso we've really focused on expediting the recovery efforts," Carlos Colon said. The post On a remote Alaskan glacier, a 73-year mission of recovery and respect first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft typosquatting scam swaps letters to steal logins
item.description: Phishing scammers use rnicrosoft.com domain to impersonate Microsoft by replacing "m" with "rn" in typosquatting attacks that steal login credentials.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SoftBank expands AI infrastructure ambitions with $4B DigitalBridge acquisition
item.description: SoftBank Group has announced plans to acquire DigitalBridge Group, an asset manager specializing in digital infrastructure investments such as data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks, in a deal valued at $4 billion.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New Mac for Christmas? Try these 6 apps and games with your new Apple computer
item.description: Did your Christmas morning start off with a Mac under the tree? No matter if you unwrapped a new MacBook, iMac, or Mac mini, that hardware is just the beginning of a gift that will keep on giving. In 2025, there are more apps and games for Apple computers than ever.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company
